resultList.dtldesc: Located in the peaceful neighborhood of New Perungalathur, Chennai, this spacious 4 BHK residential house offers a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. With modern design and ample space, it is an ideal home for families looking for a serene living experience.::::::Property Specifications ::::::This beautifully designed 4 BHK residential house offers a spacious living environment with 2445 sqft of carpet area across two floors. The house is semi-furnished and features a well-planned layout to meet all your needs. The ground floor consists of 2 spacious bedrooms, including 1 attached bathroom (western style) and 1 common bathroom (Indian style), both with geysers. The living room is designed for relaxation, and the normal kitchen is complemented by a separate puja room for peaceful moments.::::::On the first floor, you will find 2 more bedrooms, one with an attached bathroom (western style) and another common bathroom (Indian style), both equipped with geysers. The dining room and hall provide additional space for family gatherings, and the kitchen is also designed as a normal kitchen, ideal for daily cooking. The house is built with vitrified flooring throughout and is Vaastu compliant with a north-facing entrance, ensuring positive energy flow. This property offers a blend of functionality and aesthetics, making it an ideal choice for those looking for a well-balanced, spacious home in a quiet and well-connected locality.::::::Facilities ::::::The property offers essential facilities for your convenience and security. It provides bike parking, ensuring a safe spot for your two-wheelers. The house benefits from 24-hour water supply, sourced from both borewell and corporation, catering to your daily needs. With 100% power backup, you can be assured of uninterrupted electricity supply. The presence of a security guard ensures a safe and secure living environment for all residents.::::::Locality ::::::The property is located near New Perungalathur, offering easy access to essential amenities. Schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets are all within a 2 km radius, ensuring convenience for families and daily needs. Public transport is readily available, with buses and autos easily accessible. Banks and ATMs are also nearby for your financial requirements. The railway station, just 2 km away, provides excellent connectivity to the rest of the city.

resultList.dtldesc: ::Property Details::::This elegant 4 BHK flat is available for sale in the prestigious Casagrand Crescendo located at Mogappair Chennai. With a super built up area of 2193 square feet this home is thoughtfully designed to offer maximum comfort and functionality for modern living. The flat comes semi furnished and features four bedrooms three bathrooms and a balcony that ensures good ventilation and natural light. Positioned on the 17th floor of a 21 storey tower the property offers scenic views and a peaceful living experience above the city bustle. As a resale unit the flat is ready to move in making it an ideal choice for buyers looking for immediate possession.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment is east facing which is considered highly desirable for natural light and positivity. It includes spacious rooms a well laid out living and dining space along with a store room for added convenience. The flooring and finishes are designed with quality materials to create a stylish yet functional environment. The project is developed by Casagrand Builder Pvt Ltd known for their high standards and attention to detail. Being part of a modern high rise this home is equipped with facilities such as a service and goods lift ensuring convenience for residents. The freehold ownership type further adds to the value of this property.::::Facility::::Casagrand Crescendo offers a wide range of lifestyle amenities to enhance everyday living. Residents can make use of a dedicated jogging and strolling track for fitness and recreation. The property also includes a bar and lounge space providing a perfect setting for relaxation and socializing. With secure lifts reliable maintenance services and well planned common areas the project ensures safety and convenience for all its residents. Ample car parking space and round the clock utilities add to the comfort of living here. These facilities create a balanced lifestyle combining luxury leisure and practicality.::::Locality::::Located in Mogappair West Chennai this property enjoys a strategic position in one of the city’s well developed residential hubs. The area has excellent connectivity to schools hospitals shopping centers and recreational zones. Decathlon Sports is a notable nearby landmark adding convenience for fitness enthusiasts. Mogappair is known for its peaceful environment while also providing quick access to central parts of Chennai through major road networks. With a blend of urban convenience and calm surroundings the locality makes this 4 BHK flat a valuable investment as well as an ideal family home.
